name: textin-ocr
description: Textin OCR services including business license recognition, ID card recognition, document parsing, and general text recognition
author: Claude

commands.name: business-license
commands.description: Recognize business license information from an image

commands.name: id-card
commands.description: Recognize ID card information from an image

commands.name: ocr
commands.description: General OCR text recognition from an image or PDF

app_id.description: Textin App ID (set via TEXTIN_APP_ID environment variable)

secret_code.description: Textin Secret Code (set via TEXTIN_SECRET_CODE environment variable)
